metrics.name: MMLU-Pro
metrics.description: A more robust and challenging multi-task language understanding benchmark.

metrics.name: GPQA Diamond
metrics.description: Graduate-level Google-Proof Q&A benchmark for scientific reasoning.

metrics.name: HumanEval
metrics.description: Code generation benchmark for functional correctness.

metrics.name: SWE-Bench Verified
metrics.description: Real-world software engineering task resolution benchmark.

metrics.name: MATH Level 5 / MATH-500
metrics.description: Challenging mathematics reasoning benchmark (commonly reported as MATH-500).

metrics.name: GSM8K
metrics.description: Grade school math word problems benchmark.

metrics.name: LMSYS Arena ELO
metrics.description: Crowdsourced chatbot arena preference Elo rating.

metrics.name: IFEval
metrics.description: Instruction following evaluation with verifiable instructions.

metrics.name: BBH
metrics.description: Big-Bench Hard benchmark for challenging reasoning tasks.

metrics.name: WinoGrande
metrics.description: Commonsense reasoning benchmark with pronoun resolution.
